steps.title: Set up the weighted sum equation
steps.content:
The total sum of all 175 boiling points equals the sum from the semivolatile group plus the sum from the volatile group.

If we let $m$ be the mean boiling point of the 125 volatile compounds, then:
$$175 \times 167 = 50 \times 322 + 125 \times m$$

steps.title: Calculate the totals and solve
steps.content:
Evaluate the left side and the first term on the right:
$$29,225 = 16,100 + 125m$$

Subtract 16,100 from both sides:
$$13,125 = 125m$$

Divide by 125:
$$m = 105$$

The mean boiling point of the 125 volatile compounds is 105 degrees Celsius.
